content: Personally, I really like it. It's part of the game, I know a lot of people don't care for it, since the abilities/comps/wheels/posse etc. are so different, so it's a whole new learning experience. That being said, there were plenty people who didn't care for train, for example. Either force yourself to do it for the rewards or ignore and don't play it. That's how it sometimes is with gacha events in general.
thread_title: Petition to remove upcoming traphase event

content: Ugh train was an absolute SLOG to do for the rewards
